ab: Painien ho ko tireng.
Ci Namoh Kolas han ko ngangan no mako, moetepay to ko mihecaan i matini^.
en: My name is Namoh Kolas, and I’m 10 years old.

ab: Cima han ko ngangan no miso?
Ci Foting Kolas han kako.
O wawa^ no icowaay a finacadan kiso?
en: What ethnic group are you from?

ab: O wawa^ no Pangcah kako.
O Pangcah a ma’emin ko laloma’an no miso haw?
ch: A:你的家人都是原住民嗎?
en: Are all your family members indigenous?

ab: Hay, O Pangcah a ma’emin ko laloma’an no niyam.
ch: B:是的，我們全家都是阿美族人。
en: Yes, my whole family is Amis.

ab: O Pangcah a ma’emin ko laloma’an no miso haw?
ch: A:你的家人都是原住民嗎?
en: Are all your family members indigenous?

ab: Caay, o Pangcah ci mama^ no mako, o tay-wan ci ina^ no mako.
ch: B:不是，我的爸爸是阿美族，我的媽媽是漢人。
en: No, my father is Amis, and my mother is Han Taiwanese.

ab: O wawa^ nima^ kiso?
O wawa^ ni Mayaw Looh kako.
O mama^ no miso kiraan haw? pinaay to ko mihecaan niira?
ch: A:那位是你爸爸嗎? 他幾歲了?
en: Is that your father? How old is he?

ab: Enem polo’ to ko mihecaan niira.
O mama^ no miso kiraan haw? pinaay to ko mihecaan niira?
ch: A:那位是你爸爸嗎? 他幾歲了?
en: Is that your father? How old is he?

ab: Cai, o kalas no niyaro’ niyam ciira, falo^ polo’ to ko mihecaan niira.
ch: B:不是，他是我們部落的耆老，他80歲了。
en: No, he is an elder of our tribe. He is 80 years old.

ab: Pina^ to ko mihecaan no fa’inayan a kaka^ no miso?
Safawfalo^ to ko mihecaan no fa’inayan a kaka^ no mako.
Pina^ ko la’ed no mihecaan no namo?
en: Is your brother much older than you?

ab: Lima^ ko la’ed no mihecaan no niyam.
Hacowa^ katakaraw kiso?
Cecay li’an ira ko sepat polo’ ko takaraw ako.
Halafin to caay ka saso’araw, mati:ya^ takaraway to kiso?
ch: A:好久不見，你好像長高了?
en: I haven’t seen you in a while. Have you grown taller?

ab: Hay, cecay li’an ira ko tolo^ polo’ a kung-fen to ko takaraw ako.
Masoeso^ to kiso haw?
Cowa^, moraraw pinengneng iso.
Makori^ to kiso haw?
Cowa^, masoeso^ to kako.
Masoeso^ to kiso haw?
Hay, tolo^ polo’ to ko dadoy ako i matini^.
